author: Matt Wardlaw
body: good stuff, yo – thanks for hipping me to Joe’s stuff!

author: Kalena
body: Impressive! But he sounds so much older than he looks :-)

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Kalena,  
Thanks for stopping by! Yeah, there’s definitely a wealth of wisdom there in this kid… despite his only 23 years of age.

Imagine it. I mean, this is impressive stuff _now_… I just can’t wait to see what Joe Pug produces when he hits 30! :P

author: Shane
body: Nice tunes Burgo… I like this guys style!
